mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, leading to reduced consumer spending and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in weak labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods and services demand proxy signals a weakening economy, leading to reduced corporate earnings and subsequently negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in weak demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the supply proxy signals a strengthening economy, leading to increased corporate earnings and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy proxy signals a tightening monetary cycle, leading to increased discount rates applied to equity cash flows and subsequently negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening monetary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor market proxy signals a strengthening economy, leading to increased consumer spending and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong labor markets are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods and services demand proxy signals a weakening economy, leading to reduced corporate earnings and subsequently negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in weak demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the monetary policy proxy signals a loosening monetary cycle, leading to decreased discount rates applied to equity cash flows and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in loosening monetary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor market proxy signals a weakening economy, leading to reduced consumer spending and subsequently negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weak labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
